column3: Oasis, my parent’s izakaya…
column39: %player%: Oasis, my parent’s izakaya… ||TRUE,background_izakaya_storefront,none,none,izakaya|| ==Demo1==

column3: It's been almost ten years since the last time I came here.
column39: %player%: It's been almost ten years since the last time I came here.

column3: This place is still the same as I remember…
column39: %player%: This place is still the same as I remember…

column3: And yet it also feels different ever since they passed away.
column39: %player%: And yet it also feels different ever since they passed away. **color_dimin**

column3: Now it’s my job to reopen this place after being closed for almost a year.
column39: %player%: Now it’s my job to reopen this place after being closed for almost a year.

column3: I hope I can bring this place back to life, I hope I can live up to my parents’ reputation,...
column39: %player%: I hope I can bring this place back to life, I hope I can live up to my parents’ reputation,...

column3: And I hope… I can make up for the mistakes I’ve made all these years.
column39: %player%: And I hope… I can make up for the mistakes I’ve made all these years.

column3: So… you really want to reopen this place, huh?
column39: %sibling%: So… you really want to reopen this place, huh? ||TRUE,background_izakaya_interior_morning,none,none,none|| **color_dimout** @@K Sibling,stand_neutralmad,fade_in @@K

column3: %sibling%! How’ve you been, $$Lil Sis|Big Bro$$?
column39: %player%: %sibling%! How’ve you been, $$Lil Sis|Big Bro$$?

column3: Cut the small talk. I only came to make sure you’re serious about reopening this place.
column39: %sibling%: Cut the small talk. I only came to make sure you’re serious about reopening this place.

column3: There’s no way I’d joke around. This is our parent's place.
column39: %player%: There’s no way I’d joke around. This is our parent's place.

column3: I’ve got everything ready. I even went around and met the locals to promote the reopening.
column39: %player%: I’ve got everything ready. I even went around and met the locals to promote the reopening.

column3: Oh, really? If you’ve got everything ready… Did you restock the ingredients to open the shop?
column39: %sibling%: Oh, really? If you’ve got everything ready… Did you restock the ingredients to open the shop?

column3: Ah! I… I forgot. I only restocked the drinks.
column39: %player%: Ah! I… I forgot. I only restocked the drinks.

column3: Just as I thought…
column39: %sibling%: Just as I thought… @@K Sibling,stand_disappointed,none @@K

column3: Since this is just the demo, the shops in the market aren’t open yet.
column39: %sibling%: Since this is just the demo, the shops in the market aren’t open yet.

column3: So I’ll bring you the ingredients for now. Here…
column39: %sibling%: So I’ll bring you the ingredients for now. Here… ++Main,1,5++

column3: And here…
column39: %sibling%: And here… ++Main,2,5++

column3: And… Here.
column39: %sibling%: And… Here. ++Main,3,5++

column3: Oh, thank you!
column39: %player%: Oh, thank you!

column3: Remember! Once the full game is released, you’ll have to buy the ingredients yourself at the market.
column39: %sibling%: Remember! Once the full game is released, you’ll have to buy the ingredients yourself at the market.

column3: For now, I’ll keep resupplying this place to make sure you have the best ingredients every day…
column39: %sibling%: For now, I’ll keep resupplying this place to make sure you have the best ingredients every day…

column3: So we'll know exactly who to blame if this place fails.
column39: %sibling%: So we'll know exactly who to blame if this place fails. @@K Sibling,stand_angry,none @@K
%player%: … @@K Sibling,stand_angry,fade_out @@K

column3: Looks like it’s going to take a while to fix our bond.
column39: %player%: Looks like it’s going to take a while to fix our bond.

column3: But if I can show $$her|him$$ that I’m serious about running this place…
column39: %player%: But if I can show $$her|him$$ that I’m serious about running this place…

column3: I’m sure $$she|he$$’ll give me a chance to explain everything.

column3: Do you even remember how long you’ve been gone?
column39: %sibling%: Do you even remember how long you’ve been gone?

column3: TEN YEARS!
column39: %sibling%: TEN YEARS! @@K Sibling,stand_furious,none @@K

column3: Ten years you vanished without a single word… Then suddenly you just show up and decide to reopen Dad’s izakaya.
column39: %sibling%: Ten years you vanished without a single word… Then suddenly you just show up and decide to reopen Dad’s izakaya.

column3: And now you decide to apologize? That’s rich!
column39: %sibling%: And now you decide to apologize? That’s rich!

column3: You’re right. I don’t expect to be forgiven that easily.
column39: %player%: You’re right. I don’t expect to be forgiven that easily. @@K Sibling,stand_angry,none @@K

column3: I know you’ve sacrificed a lot to take care of Dad.
column39: %player%: I know you’ve sacrificed a lot to take care of Dad.

column3: Dad told me everything when I called him in the hospital a few months ago.
column39: %player%: Dad told me everything when I called him in the hospital a few months ago. @@K Sibling,stand_neutralmad,none @@K

column3: He said you withdrew from the residency program just to look after him, sacrificing your opportunity to become Psionologist.
column39: %player%: He said you withdrew from the residency program just to look after him, sacrificing your opportunity to become Psionologist.

column3: Dad was also worried you’d leave the hospital because the izakaya had been left closed for too long.
column39: %player%: Dad was also worried you’d leave the hospital because the izakaya had been left closed for too long.

column3: That’s why I quit the Nusantara Police Department and came back here.
column39: %player%: That’s why I quit the Nusantara Police Department and came back here.

column3: I’ll run our parents’ izakaya so you can focus on your career.
column39: %player%: I’ll run our parents’ izakaya so you can focus on your career.

column39: %sibling%: Ugh… Did you think my career was over because I was taking care of dad? @@K Sibling,stand_disappointed,none @@K

column3: I can still be a psionologist you know!
column39: %sibling%: I can still be a psionologist you know! @@K Sibling,stand_angry,none @@K

column39: %sibling%: In fact, I know some senior doctors who could guide me to become a psionologist.

column3: So, if guilt is the only reason you reopen Oasis, then you should GO BACK TO YOUR BARRACKS!
column39: %sibling%: So, if guilt is the only reason you reopen Oasis, then you should GO BACK TO YOUR BARRACKS! @@K Sibling,stand_furious,none @@K

column39: %sibling%: And when he was gone… I was the only one standing there. Alone.
